ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is to inform you that the corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on 25th May 2026 from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM IST.

During this window the VPN will be unavailable. Please ensure you log off from all VPN sessions before 10:00 AM and plan your work accordingly.

If you face any connectivity issues post maintenance, contact IT support at it-support@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your FedEx Delivery Fee is Pending
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (Track #123456789) could not be delivered on the scheduled date. To avoid further delay, a missed delivery fee of ₹500 must be paid immediately.

Please click the link below and complete the payment to expedite the delivery:
<URL>

This fee will be applied within 24 hours. Failure to pay may result in the shipment being returned to sender.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best Regards,
FedEx Customer Support
